strings.ios.agencyPrivacy.disableAlertMessage:
Désaktive avètisman PHI anlèv tout envit sékirité kan patajé enfòmasyon pasyan pa métòd ki pa sékirizé.

Désaktive sèlman si règ ajans ou pèmèt transmisyon PHI pa ankripté èksprèsman.

Ou ak ajans ou asimé tout résponsabilité pou tout transmisyon doné san protèksyon.

strings.ios.agencyPrivacy.phiDisabledLiabilityBo: An désaktive avètisman PHI, ou ak ajans ou aksèpté tout résponsabilité pou tout transmisyon pa ankripté di doné pasyan. MedicLog pa pral envité avan envwayé PHI pa métòd pa sékirizé. Désizyon-la sé pou ou — asiré ou ke règ ajans ou pèmèt sa èksprèsman.

strings.ios.aiParsing.howItWorksBody: Fonksyon-la sèvi ak Claude, AI Anthropic, pou analizé foto lékran monitè ak lis médikaman pou èkstraksyon doné pi prési ké trètman sou aparèy. Foto transmèt a API Anthropic pa konèksyon HTTPS ankripté, analizé, é imedyatman èfasé pa Anthropic. Si en kopi lokal gardé dan jounal sésyon ou kontrolé séparéman dan Réglaj Sésyon.

strings.ios.apiKeyHelp.hipaaBody: Si ou sèvi ak fonksyon-la avèk doné pasyan dan en anviwònman klinik, òganizasyon ou dwé gen en Business Associate Agreement (BAA) siyé avèk Anthropic. Kont API standard pa enkli en BAA. Kontakté ékip antrepriz Anthropic ou ofisyé konformité ajans ou pou gidans.

strings.ios.dispatchSetup.introMessage:
MedicLog kapab détèkté niméro run otomatikman dépi mesaj dispatch.

Sa travay dé fason:
• Kopié é kolé — kopié en mesaj dispatch, ouvri MedicLog, niméro run ranpli otomatik
• Otomatizasyon Shortcuts — niméro run détèkté imedyatman an aryèr-plan
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.pasteMessageInstructio:
Alé dan app Messages, Imel, ou CAD ou é kopié en mesaj ki gen en niméro run.

Ékwi révini isi é pézé Kontiné.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.pastePermissionExplana:
iOS mandé "Allow Paste?" chak fwa MedicLog li en mesaj dispatch kopié.

Bay pèmisyon en fwa dan Réglaj é li pa va mandé ankò.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.pastePermissionWorkflo: Kopié dispatch → ouvri MedicLog → niméro run ranpli otomatikman, pa gen popup.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.radioDispatchHint: Dispatch radyo, CAD, ou lòt sous ki pa tèks — sèvi ak "tapé en èkzanp."
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.savedMessage:
MedicLog va kounyé-a rékònet niméro run koum %@ kan ou kopié en mesaj dispatch é ouvri app-la.

Avèk otomatizasyon Shortcuts, mesaj dispatch kapab osi détèkté otomatikman an aryèr-plan — pa bezwen kopié.
strings.ios.dispatchSetup.shortcutsOfferMessage:
iOS Shortcuts kapab détèkté mesaj dispatch otomatikman é envwayé niméro run a MedicLog — pa bezwen kopié.

Sa bezwen en konfigurasyon en sèl fwa dan app Shortcuts.

strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section1Body:
MedicLog is beta software under active development. While we implement security best practices including encryption, access controls, and PHI warnings, this software is provided for evaluation purposes.

THIS APP IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND.

We implement:
• Device encryption (iOS Data Protection)
• Encrypted transmission (AirDrop, secure channels)
• PHI warnings at export points
• Local-only storage (no cloud transmission)

However, YOU remain solely responsible for HIPAA compliance.
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section2Body:
YOU (the user) are solely responsible for:
✓ Ensuring your use complies with HIPAA and applicable laws
✓ Following your organization's policies and procedures
✓ Properly handling Protected Health Information (PHI)
✓ Using device security (passcode, Face ID, encryption)
✓ Sharing data only with authorized personnel
✓ Maintaining patient confidentiality

The developer is NOT a Business Associate under HIPAA. We do not access, transmit, or store your patient data. All data remains on YOUR device.
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section3Body:
This app is a documentation tool, NOT medical advice.

Always follow your training, protocols, and medical direction.

The developer is NOT LIABLE for:
• Clinical decisions made using this app
• Errors or omissions in documentation
• Medication dosing or treatment decisions
• Patient outcomes or adverse events
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section4Body:
• All data stored locally on YOUR device only
• YOU are responsible for device security
• Enable device passcode/biometrics (Settings → Face ID & Passcode)
• Device backups (iCloud/iTunes) may contain PHI - secure appropriately
• No cloud sync - developer cannot access your data
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section5Body:
When sharing call logs via AirDrop, email, or other methods:

YOU are responsible for:
✓ Verifying recipient is authorized to receive PHI
✓ Using secure transmission methods when available
✓ Following HIPAA minimum necessary standard
✓ Documenting disclosures per your organization's requirements

Inter-agency handoffs (fire→ambulance) include patient information. This is STANDARD EMS PRACTICE and medically necessary for continuity of care. MedicLog provides BETTER security than paper handoffs.
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section6Body:
If using MedicLog as part of an organization:
✓ Obtain approval from your supervisor/compliance officer
✓ Follow organizational policies for documentation
✓ Report security incidents per your policies
✓ Understand EMS documentation requirements in your jurisdiction
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section7Body:
TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, THE DEVELOPER SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR:

• HIPAA violations or regulatory penalties
• Loss, corruption, or unauthorized access to data
• Clinical errors or patient harm
• Any damages arising from use or inability to use this app
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section8Body:
You agree to indemnify and hold harmless the developer from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from:

• Your use of this app
• Your violation of these terms
• Your violation of HIPAA or other regulations
• Clinical decisions or patient care activities
strings.ios.termsOfServiceContent.section9Body: These terms may be updated for new versions. Major changes will require re-acceptance. Continued use constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

strings.ios.watchConfig.notInstalledMessage: MedicLog pa trouvé sou Apple Watch ou. Ouvri app Watch sou iPhone ou é enstalé MedicLog pou aktive senkronizasyon Mont.
strings.ios.watchConfig.notPairedMessage: Péré en Apple Watch avèk iPhone-la dabò, épi enstalé app MedicLog Mont.
strings.ios.watchConfig.sectionDescription: Konfiguré konèktivité Apple Watch ak konpòtman antre vwa
strings.ios.watchConfig.sendWhisperMessage: Envwayé modèl transkrpsyon san konèksyon a Apple Watch ou (~77 MB, pran kèk minit pa Bluetooth). Sèlman bezwen en fwa.
strings.ios.watchConfig.showWatchStatusDescripti: Montré endikasyon konèktivité mont sou lékran koumansé apèl.
strings.ios.watchConfig.speakOnPhoneDescription: O-parlè téléfòn palé konfirmasyon antre anréjistré. Mont rèsté an silans.
strings.ios.watchConfig.speakOnWatchDescription: Mont palé antre anréjistré (non dròg ak timè) aprè téléfòn konfirmé anréjistreman.
strings.ios.watchConfig.timerPageOffDescription: Paj timè rèsté vizib jis ou navigé manyèlman.
strings.ios.watchConfig.timerPageSecondsDescript: Rétouné otomatikman a anèl dakèy aprè %lld segond inaktivité sou en paj timè.
strings.ios.watchConfig.timerUrgencyDescription: Kan en timè rivé a dekont-la, li vini otomatikman an prémyé plan sou Apple Watch.
strings.ios.watchConfig.voiceListLoadFailed: Pa kapab chajé lis vwa dépi Mont
strings.ios.watchConfig.voiceListNotConnected: Mont pa konèkté — lis vwa pa disponib
strings.ios.watchConfig.voiceModeAutoDescription: Mont va otomatikman kouté pou antre vwa kan ou lévé ponnyèt ou pandan en apèl aktif. Miyò pou opérasyon san men.
strings.ios.watchConfig.voiceModeManualDescripti: Pézé bouton LOG pou koumansé antre vwa. Miyò pou anviwònman bwiyant koté bri fon kapab déklanché fo anréjistreman.
strings.ios.watchConfig.voicePipelineDescription: Sèy silans, anlèv silans, détay parlé, oto-pwomosyon
strings.ios.watchConfig.watchVoiceDescription: Chwazi ki vwa enstalé Mont sèvi kan palé konfirmasyon médikaman.
strings.ios.watchConfig.whisperSuccessMessage: Apple Watch ou kapab kounyé-a transkri san konèksyon.
strings.ios.watchOnboarding.feature.clickEntry.d: Antre vit en sèl pézé pou entèrvansyon kouran
strings.ios.watchOnboarding.feature.configurable: Aktive, désaktive, ou ajisté réglaj Mont nenpòt ki lè dan Réglaj → Konfigurasyon Mont

strings.ios.watchOnboarding.feature.timers.title: Timè An Dirèk
strings.ios.watchOnboarding.feature.voice.descri: Palé antre dépi ponnyèt ou pandan apèl aktif
